title: umbrella
abstract: [Use of item]; This design is an umbrella with functions such as hand rehabilitation, anti-slip, lighting and telescopic length adjustment. ;[Design Description];Please refer to the attached illustration. abstract_original: ﻿【物品用途】;本設計係為一種為具有如手部復健、防滑、照明與伸縮調節長度功能之傘具。;【設計說明】;請參閱所附圖示，本設計係予人極為特殊且特異之視覺觀感，透過對稱、穩重的設計概念，使得本設計於各視角面向皆表現出特異之視覺美感。例如由各視角之放大圖觀之，即可見本設計之重點特徵具有排列多個方正或圓滑圖形之表現，同時於傘柄末尾更埋設有一圓形結構而給予畫龍點睛之效，而由立體圖與右側視圖之放大圖更可看到以方正矩形包圍流暢傘狀圖樣之外觀設計，進而予人在單純之觀感體驗下多出了獨特且新穎的視覺感受。復由其他視角觀之，本設計之傘柄係透過凹凸與特殊排列之外型，增添了視覺表現上的獨美感特性，而頂側的椎狀設計則可與傘面形成對稱表現，進而予人特異之視覺感受與美感，著實為一種充分展現創作者別樹一幟設計概念之新穎產品，並將美感與特異之視覺效果整合體現於外觀上。;據以上所述，本設計充分展現創作者之巧思概念而表現出新穎之特異視覺觀感。

title: umbrella
abstract: [Use of item]; The item in this design is an umbrella. ;[Design Description];Please refer to the attached drawings. The design features of this design umbrella mainly include a main umbrella extending radially outward from the center. The main umbrella is supported and deployed by a plurality of main ribs, and the main umbrella is A pair of umbrellas is provided on one side. The auxiliary umbrella is extended outward from the end edge of the main umbrella. The auxiliary umbrella is supported and deployed by a plurality of auxiliary ribs. The auxiliary umbrella is relatively arranged on the inner side of the main umbrella. In addition, the main parachute and the auxiliary parachute have mutually overlapping positions, and the auxiliary parachute only extends outward when the main parachute is deployed, and when the main parachute is closed, the auxiliary parachute is completely attached to the main parachute. The inner side makes the overall shape create a special and novel visual experience, and visually gives people an elegant and generous look. It is an innovative design that is both practical and beautiful, and fully complies with the design patent requirements. ; The usage status reference figures 1 and 2 in the drawings are only used to represent the status when in use, and are not part of the design of this case. The usage status reference figures 1 and 2 indicate that this creative umbrella set is equipped with a curved handle or Telescopic handle in use.
abstract_original: 【物品用途】;本設計的物品是傘。;【設計說明】;請參照附圖所示，本設計傘之設計特點主要具有一由中心向外放射狀延伸之主傘，該主傘係由複數主傘骨所支撐展開，並該主傘於一側邊設置有一副傘，該副傘係由主傘端緣往外延伸設置，並該副傘係由複數副傘骨所支撐展開，且該副傘相對設置於所述主傘之內側面，另該主傘與該副傘具有相互重疊之位置，並該副傘係於所述主傘展開時才向外延伸，而於主傘閉合時，該副傘係完全貼附所述於主傘內側面，使整體之造型營造出特殊新穎的視覺感受，且視覺上予人典雅大方之觀感，是實用性與美觀性兼具之創新設計，完全合乎設計專利要件。;圖式中之使用狀態參考圖一及二僅用於表現使用時所呈現之狀態，為本案不主張設計之部分，其中使用狀態參考圖一及二係本創作傘組設有彎把握柄或伸縮握柄之使用狀態。

title: knife
abstract: [Object Usage]; This creation is about the design of a "knife" that can be used to cut objects. ;[Design Description];The knife of this creation is mainly made in a streamlined shape, with one end being a blade and the other end being a handle. The blade is pointed and the surface of the blade forms a plurality of long concave edges arranged in parallel. A smooth arc-shaped hole is formed in the handle, and the blade of the knife extends in a streamlined arc shape from the tip of the knife to the handle. This makes the overall appearance of the knife present its unique visual beauty, and the knife Equipped with a swinging knife function that can cut items in a swinging manner. ;The colors revealed in the pictures are not the part of this creation.
abstract_original: 【物品用途】;本創作是關於一種提供切割物品用途之「刀」設計。;【設計說明】;本創作刀主要係採取流線形創作，其一端部為一刀部，另一端為柄部，該刀部為尖形，刀部表面形成複數平行排列的長形凹緣，柄部中形成圓滑的弧形孔，該刀之刀刃部係自刀部尖端呈流線型之圓弧狀延伸至柄部，藉此，使該刀之整體外觀呈現其獨特的視覺美感，且該刀具備能以搖擺方式切割物品之搖搖刀功能。;圖式所揭露之色彩，為本創作不主張之部分。

A variety of different surface compositions; viewed as a whole, this design is a novel shape, forming a visual effect design with a strong overall appearance and special grip aesthetics.

title: sword
abstract: [Use of item]; This designed item is a sword, especially a Chinese-style sword. ;[Design Description];The design feature of this design is that the sword is composed of a long and narrow straight sword body and a decorated guard and hilt. The two ends of the guard are connected to the sword body and hilt respectively, and the whole sword is made of The spine of the sword is symmetrical about the center line, and the sword body tapers from the hilt toward the blade. Multiple circles are scattered irregularly on the surface of the sword body. The guard is like a bat, and its surface shows two dragons grabbing beads and flying in the air. A dragon-like pattern is depicted between the two dragons, which together bring out the visual experience of blessing, auspiciousness, and nobility. The hilt is round and smooth as a whole. Two small circles are dotted on the hilt adjacent to the guard, and the end of the hilt is curved. The surface is decorated with symmetrical and detailed auspicious cloud patterns, delicate patterns and majestic dragon-shaped totems, which bring out a strong visual perception of traditional Chinese culture for this designed sword.
abstract_original: 【物品用途】;本設計物品係為一種劍，特別是一種中式的劍。;【設計說明】;本設計之設計特點在於劍係由一狹長筆直之劍身以及具紋飾之護手及劍柄所構成，護手兩端分別與劍身及劍柄相接，劍整體以劍脊為中心線左右對稱，劍身自劍柄朝劍鋒方向為呈漸縮，複數個圓圈不規則地散落於劍身表面，護手如蝙蝠狀，其表面顯露有雙龍搶珠並於飛騰的雙龍之間描繪出似龍頭圖案，共同帶出福氣吉祥以及尊貴華麗之視覺感受，劍柄整體圓潤流暢，二個小圓圈點綴在鄰近於護手之劍柄上，且曲弧狀劍柄端部的表面裝飾有對稱細緻之祥雲圖案，細膩之紋飾以及磅礡之龍形圖騰為本設計之劍帶出濃厚的中華傳統文化之視覺觀感。

title: Bag
abstract: ﻿[Use of items]; This design is a bag for placing items, and this design can be opened and hung for use. ;[Design Description];Please refer to the attached diagrams. The three-dimensional diagrams 1 and 2 and their respective perspective views represent the appearance of this design when it is closed, while the open state three-dimensional diagram and each open perspective view represent the appearance of this design after it is opened. state. From the attached illustrations, it can be seen that this design has a very unique and unique visual design appearance in both the closed and open states. This design is based on simplicity and stability as its main design features. It is combined with special color selection, fabric texture, and asymmetrical design to give this design a very simple and smooth appearance, giving people a visual sense of comfort and security. The look and feel really has a unique and rich visual aesthetic. Viewed from various viewing angles, in the closed state, this design gives people a unique and neat visual impression through different area divisions. In the open state, it presents a completely different visual expression, which is different from existing products. The stereotyped appearance impression is divided into neat divisions to echo the stable design concept, and different shades of colors are used to add visual richness to the viewing. At the same time, the appearance when opened has a visual perception that is not a simple plane. To sum up, this design is indeed a brand-new product that fully demonstrates the designer's unique design concept and has a novel appearance. The whole system gives people a very unique and beautiful appearance in both the open and closed states. Among them, the reference drawing is provided to illustrate the state of this design when it is hung and items are placed inside. ; According to the above, this design has a visual appearance that gives people a sense of stability, peace of mind, and comfort, and it can be seen that the use of space division and color design shows a strong simplicity and unique appearance aesthetics, and a design patent application is filed in accordance with the law.
abstract_original: ﻿【物品用途】;本設計為一種可供放置物品之包，且本設計可打開以及吊掛使用。;【設計說明】;請參閱所附圖示，其中立體圖1、2及其各視角視圖表示本設計關閉時之外觀狀態，而打開狀態立體圖及各打開狀態視角視圖即表示本設計打開後之外觀狀態。由所附圖示觀之，可見本設計於關閉與打開之狀態下皆具有相當特異且別緻之視覺設計外觀。本設計係以簡約與穩重為主要設計特徵表現，並結合特殊選色與布料紋理，以及不對稱之設計，使本設計具有十分簡潔且流暢之外觀表現，予人既舒適又充滿安全感之視覺觀感，著實具備特異且豐富之視覺美感。於各視角觀之，關閉狀態下本設計透過不同的區域劃分設計而皆予人獨特且整齊之視覺觀感，打開狀態則呈現為另種截然不同之視覺表現，且有別於既有產品之刻板外觀印象，除以整齊之區隔表現呼應穩重之設計概念，更以深淺不一之色彩增添觀看上之視覺豐富度，同時打開時之外觀更是具有非單純平面之視覺觀感。綜上，本設計著實為一充分展現出設計者別具匠心設計理念且具有新穎外觀之嶄新產品，整體係在打開與關閉之狀態下皆予人十分特異且富含美感之外觀表現。其中，參考圖係供以示意本設計吊掛且內部擺放物品時之狀態。;據以上所述，本設計係具備予人穩重、安心、舒適之視覺外觀，並可見運用空間區隔及色彩之設計而顯現出濃厚之簡約與特異之外觀美感，乃依法提出設計專利申請。

title: Bag
abstract: ﻿【Use of items】;This design is a bag that can be used to hold items. ;[Design Description];Please refer to the attached diagram. The overall appearance of this design has a very unique visual aesthetic. Viewed from a three-dimensional view with the front and rear views, this design forms a streamlined appearance with one side high and one side low. The bottom side has an opening like a fish fin, while the top side of the bag is designed to match the height of the bottom side and has an opposite design expression, and has different patterns on both ends of the bag body, making the overall appearance more beautiful. Looks playful and lively. Viewed from the front and rear views, it can be seen that this design looks like the hull of a sailing ship, giving people a unique visual beauty. Viewed from the bottom view, this design presents a completely different appearance from the traditional package body, giving people a special and unique visual experience. In summary, this design truly fully embodies the creator's unique design concept and is a brand-new product with a novel appearance. According to the above, this design integrates beauty and unique visual effects into the overall appearance, and has a unique and aesthetically pleasing visual presentation from all viewing angles. Therefore, a design patent application is filed in accordance with the law.
abstract_original: ﻿【物品用途】;本設計係為一種可供以容納物品之包。;【設計說明】;請參閱所附圖示，本設計整體之外觀輪廓係具備極為特異之視覺美感，以立體圖搭配前後視圖觀之，本設計形成一側高一側低之流線外觀輪廓，且底側係具有一如魚鰭般之開口，而頂側包身則是配合底側高低設計而呈相反之設計表現，並於包身兩端具有相異之花紋呈現，而使整體外觀更顯俏皮生動。復由前後視圖觀之，則可見本設計似如一航行之船體般，予人特異之視覺美感。由仰視圖觀之，本設計呈現完全有別於傳統包體之造型外觀，而予人特殊且奇異之視覺感受。綜上，本設計著實充分體現創作者獨具匠心之設計概念，而為具備新穎外觀表現之嶄新產品。;據以上所述，本設計將美感與特異之視覺效果融合體現於整體外觀上，且於各視角皆具備獨特且富含美感之特異視覺呈現，乃依法提出設計專利申請。

title: Bag
abstract: [Use of the item]; This designed item is a bag that allows the user to hold items and hold newspapers and magazines on the outer surface; or a bag with a strap for carrying. ;[Design Description];The characteristic of this design is that the side of the bag is relatively narrow and roughly symmetrical when viewed from the left and right, and there are a plurality of upright lines on the left and right sides. Viewed from the front and back views, the visual perception is composed of a background color block cloth surface and a plurality of upright geometric line cloth surfaces, and the upright geometric line cloth surface can be stretched relative to the background color block cloth surface. support. For example, as shown in the front view and reference drawing, the upright geometric line fabric can be stretched and stuffed with newspapers or magazines. As far as the visual perception is concerned, whether it is a simple bag structure, or an additional carrying strap, or whether it is stuffed with newspapers and magazines, the visual perception has different and surprising changes. The overall appearance of this design obviously has a unique visual effect. Make an application in accordance with the law.
abstract_original: 【物品用途】;本設計物品，係為一種包，供使用者可容納物品，同時亦可於外表面夾持報章雜誌；或外加背帶供以背持的包。;【設計說明】;本設計之特點在於該袋體由左、右視圖觀之，其側面較為狹窄，且左右大致對稱，另左、右之側面上形成有複數直立線條表現。而由前、後視圖觀之，其視覺觀感乃一底色區塊布面，搭配複數直立之幾何線條布面所構成，且該直立之幾何線條布面可相對於底色區塊布面拉撐。例如由前視圖及參考圖所示，該直立之幾何線條布面可拉撐後塞置報紙或雜誌。就視覺觀感而言，無論是單純之袋體結構，或附加提帶；抑或是塞置報章雜誌，其視覺觀感各自存有差異性之驚異變化，如是本設計整體外觀明顯具特異視覺效果，爰依法提出申請。

title: fork
abstract: [Use of item]; This designed item is a type used in the production of edible and biodegradable tableware and forks. ;[Design Description];The design feature of this design is that it mainly includes the design of a lotus-shaped cutlery fork. The back of the front end of the cutlery fork holding handle forms a fork that resembles a three-dimensional lotus-shaped protruding rib. The cutout is shaped into two short long strips on both sides, and a long strip in the middle. The sharp parts of the cutlery forks are two corresponding three-dimensional curves, and the three cutouts are Asymmetrical design, its three slits and sharp sections form an asymmetrical design. The overall shape presents a sense of smooth, soft and friendly lines combined with multiple lines. Here, the three-dimensional lotus shape of the cutlery fork is used. The forks, sharp parts and three-cut grooves of the protruding ribs present a smooth, coherent and personalized visual experience; the overall shape design is both practical and aesthetically pleasing, giving people a unique style of visual experience and presenting a modern It is an avant-garde and ingenious design that is different from the designs currently seen in the industry. It is truly a first-of-its-kind new style of tableware and fork. It should have met the requirements for establishing a design patent and an application should be filed in accordance with the law.
abstract_original: ﻿【物品用途】;本設計物品，係一種生產可食用可生物降解之餐具叉所使用之型態。;【設計說明】;本設計之設計特點在於，該其主要包括蓮花型態之餐具叉之設計，其餐具叉握持把手前端背面係形成一如立體蓮花型態凸肋之叉部，其叉部剖槽型成兩側邊兩短長條狀剖槽，靠中間部為一長條狀之剖槽，其餐具叉尖銳部係為兩兩相對應立體的曲線型態視覺，且三剖槽非對稱設計，其三剖槽與尖銳部係形成非對稱之設計型態，其由整體形態呈現有圓融、柔和的親和力多重線條所結合的線條感，在此藉由餐具叉立體蓮花型態凸肋之叉部以及尖銳部及三剖槽顯現出流暢、一氣呵成又兼具個性化的視覺感受；整體造型設計兼具實用性及整體美感，予人一種獨特風格之視覺感受，呈現出現代又前衛的巧思，不同於目前業界所見之設計，誠為一餐具叉的首創新式樣，應已符合設計專利成立要件，爰依法提出申請。

title: pad
abstract: ﻿[Use of item]; This design is related to the pattern design on the surface of the mat. Through processing, it can be made into floor mats, table mats, game mats, and picnic mats. ;[Design Description];Please refer to all pictures. This design sets a pattern arranged in a starburst shape in the center, and then uses the aforementioned pattern as the center to surround an array of branch and leaf patterns, and intersperses the pattern of branches and leaves with patterns like stars. Set star patterns from the main pattern in the middle upward, upper left, upper right, lower, lower left, and lower right respectively, and then set secondary patterns slightly smaller than the main pattern on the upper left, upper right, lower left, and lower right of the main pattern, and then use a The frame line covers the main and secondary textures; this design forms a larger pattern effect by connecting the drawings, making the overall changes into vivid and elegant patterns, each showing different changes in style, which is actually the introduction of two-dimensional patterns. Eye-catching innovation and beautiful design. ; To sum up, this design is a complete and balanced pattern design based on the unique ingenuity of the creator, fully demonstrating the unique design features and presenting an aesthetic visual experience.

abstract: [Use of item]; The item used in this design is a kind of fabric, which is used for products with this kind of pattern design. ;[Design Description];This creation is a cloth pattern design, which is a graphic design in which "pattern units" are continuously distributed by a plurality of elliptical points. abstract_original: 【物品用途】;本設計所應用之物品係一種布料，乃用於具有此種花紋設計的產品。;【設計說明】;本創作為一種布花紋設計，其為複數個橢圓點集合而成之「花紋單元」連續分佈之平面設計。其主要應用於布料、皮革或板材上之平面裝飾者。該「花紋單元」中，係包括在一個襯底平面上，由呈45度角複數個橢圓點集合而成之二個左右相互鏡射對稱正方形區塊所構成，而左右正方形區塊分別由不同之二種設色橢圓點排列出二個梯形與二個三角形面積所組成。藉由「花紋單元」中正方形區塊與其鏡射對稱區塊四邊彼此相鄰相接，於連續交錯分佈後，整體花紋於物品平面上呈現出特異視覺。;整體觀之，本設計主要獨特之處，乃藉由本花紋單元圖於連續延伸交錯後，所創造出之皮革壓紋印象及菱格紋交錯效果，完全符合新穎性及設計性之設計要件，充分展現時尚感之獨創設計。本設計圖示所揭露之色彩為本案不主張之部分。

abstract_original: ﻿【物品用途】;本設計為可供閱讀之物品。;【設計說明】;請參閱所附圖示，其中圖式所揭露之粉紅色遮蔽區域，為本案不主張設計之部分。本設計係以溫暖色系為整體外觀底色，並搭配對比強烈之藍紅雙色而形成十分吸睛奪目之外觀表現。同時，此設計圖案之邊緣係經過特別設計而予人似如以眼探究之觀看感受，於圖案整體構成，則是巧妙地利用留白區域構成切分出如守護者般之剪影，搭配另側之長者意象，充分地展現出藉由豐沛力量而保護長者之意涵。在設計圖案之中央近圓形留白處，則是擺放各式各樣的圖畫表徵，以另種手繪風格呈現出設計者欲展現的各種訊息，而共構形成將各種圖案融會合而為一且具備十分特異外觀美感之設計圖案，同時亦充分表達設計者之創作理念。其中，參考圖1~9供以表示本設計內頁展開後之狀態。綜上，本設計著實為一種外觀新穎獨特，且富含創作者獨具匠心設計理念之嶄新產品。;據以上所述，本設計係以獨特之色彩運用結合手繪圖案，構成極為特異且蘊涵設計者表達意向之外觀，予人相當吸睛、豐富且充滿鬥志與動力之特異視覺感受。

title: Book
abstract: ﻿【Item Usage】;This design can be used by users to write, read and make customized items. ;[Design Description];Please refer to the attached diagram. The initial design concept of this design is based on the concept proposed by an elder. According to the elder, after a person reaches a certain age, he often begins to think about his life. Memories and events, big and small, however, many past memories will inevitably fade over time. If prompts through various key words or questions can be used, it will be very helpful for the elderly to review various sweet and bitter memories. . Therefore, the design team designed based on this concept, and targeted the elderly through various funny hand-painted patterns so that the elderly can intuitively read and use it, and help the elderly recall various events from birth to the present. Memories big and small. ; In view of the memory concept proposed by the elder, refer to the three-dimensional view, front view and unfolded state diagram 1, this design specially invited the elder to sign the signature, and chose to use the elder's signature handwriting as the main visual feature , supplemented by many interesting and vivid colorful patterns as embellishments, forming a rich and warm appearance. In each expanded state diagram, it can also be seen that the design team uses hand-drawn style patterns full of childlike interest to enhance the overall visual beauty and uniqueness of each page. For various themes, the design team uses its own ideas and style And reinterpret and create novel and unique pattern expressions, thereby giving people a very specific and unique visual experience. Among them, the text in the translucent colored area revealed in the drawing is a part of this design that is not intended to be designed.
abstract_original: ﻿【物品用途】;本設計可供使用者書寫、閱讀並製成專屬化物品。;【設計說明】;請參閱所附圖示，本設計之初始設計構想係基於一位長者所提出之概念，據長者所言，人活至一定年歲後，便時常開始回想一生中的大小回憶、事件，然，有許多往事記憶仍不免隨著時間而漸漸淡化，若可透過各類關鍵字詞或問題之提示，則十分有助於長者好好地回顧各種酸甜苦辣的記憶。故本設計團隊係基於此一概念進行設計，並以長者為使用對象而透過各種逗趣之手繪風格圖案，以讓長者可直覺地閱讀使用，協助長者回憶由出生至今之各類大小回憶。;有感於該長者所提出之回憶概念，參閱立體圖、前視圖及展開狀態圖1，本設計係特別邀請該長者進行落款，並選擇使用該長者之落款字跡做為主要之視覺特徵，再輔以諸多富含趣味與生動感之彩色圖案作為點綴，而構成豐富且充滿溫馨感之外觀表現。於各展開狀態圖中，亦可見本設計團隊以富含童趣感的手繪風格圖案提升各頁次的整體視覺美感與特異感，針對各類主題，本設計團隊皆透過自身之想法與風格而重新詮釋並創作出新穎且別樹一格之圖案表現，進而予人十分特異且獨特之視覺感受。其中，圖式所揭露之半透明填色區域之文字為本設計不主張設計之部分。

abstract: [Purpose of the article]; The designed article is a cup. To be more specific, it is a cup with a pressure relief hole and a pushable part to facilitate opening and closing. ;[Design Description];Please refer to the three-dimensional view of this design. The appearance of the cup proposed in this design is characterized by a cup lid with a hand-held tail, which extends outward along the edge of the cup lid to facilitate the user to remove the cup lid. Or cover the cup, and there is a pressure relief hole on the cup lid. When the temperature of the drink contained in the cup is high, the excess pressure can be released through the pressure relief hole. In addition, please refer to the reference picture. The bottom of the cup has a silicone gasket. In addition to making the cup anti-slip when placed on the table, when the temperature of the drink contained in the cup is high, the bottom of the cup can also function when the user holds the cup. To the effect of heat insulation. Taken together, the visual appearance of this creation can showcase a novel personal design style. No matter viewed from any angle, this design can give people a practical feeling as a whole, with novel visual effects and creativity. It can also contain practical functions, which meets the requirements for design patent applications. abstract_original: 【物品用途】;本設計物品係為杯，更詳而言之，其為一種具有洩壓孔，並設有可推開部件以方便啟閉的杯子。;【設計說明】;請參閱本設計之立體圖，本設計提案的杯，其外觀的特點為具有一手持尾部的杯蓋，順著杯蓋邊緣向外延伸，以方便使用者將杯蓋移除或蓋上杯具，而在杯蓋上設有洩壓孔，當杯子內所盛的飲品溫度較高時，可將多餘的壓力由洩壓孔處洩出。此外，請參閱參考圖，杯的底部具有矽膠墊圈，除了可使杯置於桌上時具有防滑的機能外，當杯子內所盛的飲品溫度較高，使用者手持杯的底部也能起到隔熱的作用。綜合以上，本創作的視覺外觀可展現出新穎的個人設計風格。本設計不論從任何角度觀之，整體能夠予人實用的感受，具有新穎的視覺效果及創作性，同時也能含有實用功能，符合設計專利申請之要件。上述說明僅供輔助瞭解本創作而非用以限制其內容；應當理解，本設計內容以圖面所視為準。

abstract: ﻿【Use of item】;The "cup" designed in this design is a container for holding drinks. ;[Design Description];The AA end section view is the AA end section view in the left view. ;The main features of the cup shape of this design include: when viewed from the three-dimensional view and each view, the overall shape of the cup is a transparent round cup body; when viewed from the left side view, it has a gradually expanding shape from the bottom edge of the cup upward to the waist of the cup body. Then it gradually narrows upward to the mouth of the cup, and the contour of the mouth of the cup is not a perfect circle, which is an asymmetric design. The front side of the mouth is a concave arc shape, and the back side is a convex arc shape. Looking from the front view, the front rim of the cup forms a smile concave arc shape from the outside to the inside of the cup. This smile concave arc design is just like the line shape produced by the user's mouth touching the drinking cup when drinking. . ; Judging from the AA end section view, the inner wall of the cup is formed by a plurality of arcs surrounding the cup body, matching the overall gradual diameter expansion and contraction shape. Viewed from a three-dimensional view, the cup body can be refracted by light to produce a visual effect of numerous interlaced lines, giving the overall structure a rather elegant aesthetic. ;This design completely breaks away from the stereotyped and monotonous impression of the existing cup body, and presents an innovative three-dimensional shape as a whole. It is indeed a novel and unique design.
abstract_original: ﻿【物品用途】;本設計『杯』係提供承裝飲料之容器。;【設計說明】;A-A端面剖面圖為左側視圖中之A-A端面剖視圖。;本設計杯造型特點主要包括：由立體圖及各視圖觀之，整體呈現一透明之圓形杯身；從左側視圖觀之，由杯底緣向上至杯體腰部呈漸形擴徑造型，再向上漸形縮徑至杯口，且杯口輪廓非正圓為左右不對稱設計，前側鴉嘴處為凹弧狀，後側則為凸弧狀。再由前視圖觀之，前方杯口緣下由外往杯內呈一微笑凹弧造型，此微笑凹弧造型設計尤如使用者在飲用時，口部觸碰品飲杯所產生的線條造型。;由A-A端面剖面圖觀之，杯體內壁是由多數條圓弧形圍繞杯體而成，配合整體漸形擴徑與縮徑之造型。由立體圖觀之，杯體可透過光線折射產生有多數線條交錯之視覺效果，使整體結構頗具雅緻之美感。;本設計完全跳脫既有杯體之刻板單調印象，整體呈現創新立體造型感，確實為一新穎、獨特之設計。

title: cup
abstract: [Use of object]; This creation is about the design of a "cup", especially a cup with a special curve shape that can accommodate liquid storage space. The user can experience the unique enjoyment of taste, smell and vision at the same time. ;[Design Description];Please refer to each picture. This creation is a cup, including a cup body and a bottom edge. The rear edge of the cup body is an arc shape, and the front edge first tapers inward from the top. It protrudes outward and then shrinks inward when it is close to the bottom, forming a curved body with a diameter that first shrinks inward and then convexes outward. The mouth of the cup gradually rises from the front edge to the rear edge, forming an ellipse that gradually rises. The annular cup mouth, viewed from the front view, the rear edge of the cup mouth is higher than the front edge and shrinks inward to form a ring, and the cup body forms a meandering curved line from top to bottom; viewed from the side view, the rear edge is a complete The curve extends upward to form an elliptical side curve. The cup mouth is formed on the oblique front edge to form an inclined mouth area. The front edge of the cup mouth is curved and extended inward to form the cup neck and then gradually convex downward to form the cup belly. The inner end forms a cup bottom, and a ring-shaped bottom edge protrudes from the bottom of the cup bottom so that the cup can stand stably on a flat surface. In this way, by tilting the mouth of the cup from the top, the aroma of the tea soup in the cup can advance toward the nasal cavity, so that the aroma can be transferred to the nose to feel the aroma of tea after brewing in the cup. The cup neck is tapered inward to form a cup neck that fits the fingertips and makes it easier to grasp. The front edge of the cup is pressed against the lips, allowing the tea soup to flow from the tip of the tongue, the belly of the tongue to the base of the tongue to taste the sweetness, sourness, and sweetness of the tea soup. It gradually widens downward to contain the solution to form a larger holding space, and then tapers downward to form the bottom of the cup. Produce a detailed, beautiful, novel and unique special line, forming a special shape of "cup" design. The overall shape is rich in diverse visual images in the curve. The appearance is simple and light, and the whole brings a sense of comfort and harmony. It is original and can produce unique visual effects for users. abstract_original: 【物品用途】;本創作係有關於一種「杯」之設計，尤指具有特殊曲線造型可容納液體容置空間之杯，使用者可同時感受味覺、嗅覺及視覺之特異享受。;【設計說明】;請參閱各圖所示，本創作係為一種杯子，包含一杯體及一底緣，該杯體後緣係為一圓弧狀，前緣由頂端先向內漸縮後向外凸出，於接近底部再向內收縮，使其構成口徑先內縮後外凸在向內收之曲線體，杯口係由前緣向後緣漸升，使其形成一橢圓漸升環形杯口，由前視圖觀之，杯口後緣高於前緣向內收縮形成環狀，杯體由上而下形成一蜿蜒彎曲線條；由側視圖觀之，後緣係為一完整曲線，向上延伸形成一橢圓側邊曲線，在斜向前緣形成杯口，使其形成傾斜就口區域，杯口前緣係彎曲向內延伸形成杯頸後向下漸凸形成杯腹後向內收尾形成杯底，杯底底部係突出一環形底緣，使該杯體可平穩站立於平面上。;藉此，係由頂端傾斜杯口可使杯內茶湯香味往鼻腔前進，使香氣於杯中醞釀後傳遞至鼻內感受茶香，向內漸縮形成杯頸使其符合手指掌握，並使前緣杯口抵置嘴唇，使茶湯由舌尖、舌腹至舌根以品嚐茶湯之甜、酸、甘味，向下漸寬包含溶液使其形成較大容置空間，後向下漸縮形成杯底產生一細緻、美觀、新穎及獨特之特殊線條，形成一特殊造型之「杯」設計，整體造型於曲線中富有多樣化之視覺意象，外型簡潔輕巧，整體帶來一種舒適和諧之感，別出心裁並可使使用者產生獨特之視覺效果，深具巧思並獨具創設意象，堪稱迥異習知者，足以吸引使用者眼光進而刺激購買欲，完全符合設計專利之申請要件，爰依法提出申請。

title: pestle
abstract: [Use of item]: This designed item is a pestle that can be used as a magical weapon. ;[Design Description];The design feature of this design is that its overall shape is roughly large at the top and small at the bottom. The middle section of the body is equipped with two parallel plurality of ring beads. There are also two parallel beads facing forward and backward between the two parallel ring beads. It has a symmetrical multi-layered base on the left and right sides. There is a bead in the center of the multi-layered base. The upper and lower ends of the parallel beads are equipped with eight long strips of multi-layered ornaments surrounding each other. The two ends are arc-shaped and there is a recessed part in the middle. , the recessed part is also provided with ring beads, and the center of the long ornament is provided with a convex decorative strip along its long direction. The upper and lower ends of the long ornament are provided with a plurality of ring beads, among which, the lower end of the long ornament is The lower end of most ring beads is equipped with a blade handle with recessed portions facing the front, rear, left, and right sides. The lower end of the blade handle is provided with a blade in the shape of a quadrangular pyramid corresponding to the recess. Each blade is provided with an arc concave groove on the surface. There is a cone-shaped neck on the top of most of the beads on the upper end of the ornament. On the top of the cone-shaped neck is a symmetrical three-faced skull hat with an angry god. The top of the hat is also equipped with a plate seated on a cone-shaped base. A Buddha statue forms a design with a unique visual effect on the overall appearance.
